data.title: US Small Business Optimism Hits 3-Year High As Election Results 'Signal A Major Shift'
data.description: Small businesses are entering the holiday season with newfound confidence and momentum, thanks to post-election policies and reduced inflation.

data.description: Cardiff Oncology's CRDF-004 trial shows promising onvansertib results in RAS-mutated mCRC patients, with higher tumor response rates and a strong safety profile.
